creator: eserte@cs.tu-berlin.de
text:
`patch' ocassionally creates files in wrong directories.

Fix: 

The problem does not appear with the official patch as found
	on gnu archives (I tried the one from
	ftp://ftp.cs.tu-berlin.de/pub/gnu/patch).

	Slaven
How-To-Repeat: 
	The problem often appeared applying patches to perl5, e.g.
	patching from perl5.003_26.tar.gz with perl5.003_27.pat.gz.
	(For example, `XSsymSet.pm' is created in the directory `ext'
	instead of `vms/ext').
